name: prompt-harness
description: Capture human prompts into a private, project-local ledger and backfill Claude Code and Codex history.

interface.shortDescription: Keep a private prompt ledger per project.
interface.longDescription: Prompt Harness captures each human prompt through UserPromptSubmit, imports historical Claude Code and Codex prompts, and builds a durable event layer for future badcase regression harnesses.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Prompt Harness for this project and explain what will be stored.
Backfill this project's Claude Code and Codex user prompts, then validate the ledger.
Search this project's human prompt history for a topic.
